name: nutshell-vscode
description: Stream project docs to your Even Realities G2 glasses. Runs a local Nutshell server in-process and can transform your existing docs into the G2 display format via Claude Code.

nutshell.mode.description: How to serve docs. passthrough: serve an existing folder as-is. transform: reformat a folder into a gitignored G2 mirror. urlOnly: no docs, just the URL relay.

nutshell.sourceDocsPath.description: Passthrough: the folder to serve. Transform: the source folder to read from.

nutshell.outputDocsPath.description: Transform only: the generated G2-formatted mirror folder. Auto-gitignored. Change to '.nutshell-docs' for a dot-prefixed hidden folder.

nutshell.name.description: Display name on the phone. Defaults to the workspace folder name.

nutshell.autoStart.description: Start the server automatically when the workspace opens.

nutshell.autoTransformOnSave.description: Transform mode only: re-transform a file when it's saved. Uses Claude Code credit.

nutshell.ollama.description: When spawning the server, enable the local LLM proxy via Ollama.

nutshell.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model for the local LLM proxy.

nutshell.apiKey.description: API key for an externally-started Nutshell server. Paste the key shown in the server's terminal output. The extension saves it to .nutshell-api-key on first use so you only need to set this once.

engines_note: node >=18 required at runtime via VS Code
